original_statement: what year was the only time india has won in the rivalry?
mutated_statement: what year was the only time one side has won in the rivalry, while it must simultaneously be recorded as a win and as a loss, be the sole occurrence yet also one of several, and have taken place before the rivalry began?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Contradictory constraint insertion + Temporal contradiction: "india" replaced by generic "one side" (india → one side) | adds mutually inconsistent clauses requiring the event to be both a win and a loss and simultaneously unique and one of several (only time → only time ... yet also one of several; win → win and loss) | adds impossible temporal requirement that it occurred before the rivalry began (in the rivalry → taken place before the rivalry began)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志可见关键证据：iteration 0 的 simple_query 返回“1986”并说明“表中仅有1986为India win”，tree_and_critic 的 critique 明确指出第3步忽略了变异问题中列出的相互矛盾条件（“同时为胜利和失利”“既是唯一又是若干之一”“发生在对抗开始之前”等）。agent 在操作上仅做了 select_row/select_column（均为无意义的 no-op），直接按简化假设回答原始问题，未提出澄清或尝试将矛盾修正为可解问题。虽然后续 judge_thought 指出应为“None/N/A”，但 agent 的预测为空或仍未给出合乎矛盾约束的答复。综上，agent 表现为忽视矛盾指令，基于可行子集推进任务，既未合理化矛盾也未主动修正或询问，故归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”。
